title: A Cover for Yes, Please? Oui Oui!
excerpt: Domi shared with us this layout she made using Yes, Please that appeared on the cover of Esprit Scrapbooking . Here's what she had to say, "My pages are often published, but this is the first time my page is…
body:
Domi shared with us this layout she made using Yes, Please that appeared on the cover of Esprit Scrapbooking. Here's what she had to say, "My pages are often published, but this is the first time my page is on cover! I am very proud, I love to work with your papers, they are so beautiful! I've just bought a full pack and stickers, this collection with these bright colors is a real treat!"

Thanks so much for using our products and congratulations on having this published!
